name: Roasted Beef with Horseradish Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, stir together all marinade ingredients except parsley and coat the beef with the marinade.
2. Cover; refrigerate overnight.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Bake the roast in the marinade for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until fork-tender.
5. Meanwhile, stir together all horseradish cream ingredients except parsley in a small bowl and cover; refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Serve over carved roast.
